definition: successful in producing the intended result
examples: The new method was very effective.
Clear communication is an effective tool.
The medicine is effective against the infection.
The report must be completely accurate.
The map gives accurate information.
Her prediction was surprisingly accurate.

definition: knowing about a situation or fact
sentence: Are you _____ of the new rules?
examples: Are you aware of the new rules?
Most people are aware of the problem.
She became aware that someone was following her.

definition: to accept something as true without proof
examples: Do not assume that everyone agrees.
I assumed the meeting started at ten.
We should not assume the task is easy.

definition: to advise someone to do or choose something
sentence: I would _____ this book to beginners.
examples: I would recommend this book to beginners.
Doctors recommend regular exercise.
Can you recommend a good hotel?

definition: to recognise and name someone or something
examples: Can you identify the main problem?
The police identified the suspect.
We need to identify areas for improvement.
Regular checks can prevent accidents.
This lock prevents the door from opening.
Exercise may help prevent illness.

definition: to give full attention to something
examples: Please focus on the main task.
She finds it hard to focus in noisy places.
The report focuses on customer needs.

definition: a particular way of doing something
examples: This is a simple learning method.
We tested several methods.
The new method saves time.

definition: the outcome of an action or process
sentence: The final _____ was better than expected.
examples: The final result was better than expected.
Hard work often produces good results.
We are waiting for the test results.

definition: facts or information that show something is true
sentence: There is no clear _____ to support the claim.
examples: There is no clear evidence to support the claim.
The police collected new evidence.
The results provide evidence of improvement.
We need a practical solution.
They found a simple solution to the problem.
There is no perfect solution.

definition: the standard of how good something is
examples: Customers expect high quality.
The product is known for its quality.
We need to improve service quality.

definition: a level of quality used for comparison
examples: The product meets the required standard.
Safety standards are very strict.
Her work is always of a high standard.

definition: to roughly calculate or judge a value
examples: Can you estimate the total cost?
We estimate that the work will take two days.
The engineer gave us a price estimate.

sentence: We need to _____ the data first.
examples: We need to analyze the data first.
The team analyzed customer feedback.
Scientists analyze the results carefully.

definition: a plan designed to achieve a goal
examples: We need a better marketing strategy.
The company changed its business strategy.
Planning is an important part of any strategy.
